description: Admin dashboard statistics - aggregated metrics for overview cards

endpoints.name: Get Dashboard Stats

frontendUsage.frontendDescription: Displays stat cards on admin dashboard homepage showing total users, total orders, total sales, and pending orders with percentage change and trend arrows
frontendUsage.mockStatus: Uses VITE_API_BASE_URL presence check. Falls back to mock data if not set.
frontendUsage.knownIssue: Bug: imports non-existent 'apiGet' from apiClient.js. apiClient only exports the axios instance.

endpoints.frontendDisplay: Four stat cards in a grid on dashboard homepage, each showing: icon, metric title (localized), large formatted value, colored percentage badge (green for up, red for down), and descriptive label. Each card has a trend arrow icon.
